records.question: Which courses have a course description of p and a course name of ds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
WHERE courses.course_description = 'p' AND courses.course_name = 'ds'
records.pred_sql: SELECT course_id FROM Courses WHERE course_description = 'p' AND course_name = 'ds'

records.question: What courses named ds with a description of p have sections named d where the section description is voluptas?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
WHERE courses.course_description = 'p' AND sections.section_description = 'voluptas' AND courses.course_name = 'ds' AND sections.section_name = 'd'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Courses.course_id
FROM Courses
JOIN Sections ON Courses.course_id = Sections.course_id
WHERE Courses.course_name = 'ds'
  AND Courses.course_description = 'p'
  AND Sections.section_name = 'd'
  AND Sections.section_description = 'voluptas'

records.question: Which courses have the name ml and include sections described as qui?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
WHERE courses.course_name = 'ml' AND sections.section_description = 'qui'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Courses.course_id
FROM Courses
JOIN Sections ON Courses.course_id = Sections.course_id
WHERE Courses.course_name = 'ml' AND Sections.section_description = 'qui'

records.question: Which courses with the name la and description n were offered in the summer 2010 semester where the semester description is exactly g?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN semesters ON student_enrolment.semester_id = semesters.semester_id
WHERE semesters.semester_description = 'g' AND courses.course_name = 'la' AND semesters.semester_name = 'summer 2010' AND courses.course_description = 'n'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Courses.course_id
FROM Courses
JOIN Sections ON Sections.course_id = Courses.course_id
JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses ON Student_Enrolment_Courses.course_id = Courses.course_id
JOIN Student_Enrolment ON Student_Enrolment.student_enrolment_id = Student_Enrolment_Courses.student_enrolment_id
JOIN Semesters ON Semesters.semester_id = Student_Enrolment.semester_id
WHERE Courses.course_name = 'la'
  AND Courses.course_description = 'n'
  AND Semesters.semester_name = 'summer 2010'
  AND Semesters.semester_description = 'g'

records.question: What courses is the student with the email address gracie29@example.com enrolled in?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN students ON student_enrolment.student_id = students.student_id
WHERE students.email_address = 'gracie29@example.com'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Courses.course_id
FROM Students
JOIN Student_Enrolment ON Students.student_id = Student_Enrolment.student_id
JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses ON Student_Enrolment.student_enrolment_id = Student_Enrolment_Courses.student_enrolment_id
JOIN Courses ON Student_Enrolment_Courses.course_id = Courses.course_id
WHERE Students.email_address = 'gracie29@example.com'

records.question: Which math courses with a description exactly q were taken by students whose SSN is 39, other details are nesciunt, email is qo'kon@example.com, and who left on or after 1990-09-01 05:03:27?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN students ON student_enrolment.student_id = students.student_id
WHERE courses.course_description = 'q' AND students.ssn = '39' AND courses.course_name = 'math' AND students.other_student_details = 'nesciunt' AND students.date_left >= '1990-09-01 05:03:27' AND students.email_address = 'qo''kon@example.com'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Courses.course_id
FROM Courses
JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses ON Courses.course_id = Student_Enrolment_Courses.course_id
JOIN Student_Enrolment ON Student_Enrolment_Courses.student_enrolment_id = Student_Enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN Students ON Student_Enrolment.student_id = Students.student_id
WHERE Courses.course_description = 'q'
  AND Courses.course_name LIKE '%math%'
  AND Students.ssn = '39'
  AND Students.other_student_details = 'nesciunt'
  AND Students.email_address = "qo'kon@example.com"
  AND (Students.date_left IS NULL OR Students.date_left >= '1990-09-01 05:03:27')

SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses

WHERE courses.course_description = 'q' AND courses.course_name = 'math' AND sections.section_name = 'b' AND sections.section_description = 'voluptatem'
records.pred_sql:

FROM Courses
JOIN Sections ON Courses.course_id = Sections.course_id
WHERE Courses.course_name = 'math'
